zh.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon是Cadwgan ap Bleddyn的兒子，於1204年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根利安善納。他和Betyn Norris至少有9個兒子。他去世於1320年在英國威爾斯享年116歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon是Cadwgan ap Bleddyn的儿子，于1204年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根利安善納。他和Betyn Norris至少有9个儿子。他去世于1320年在英国威尔斯享年116岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: 'Dew'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon was born in 1204, in Llansannor, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Cadwgan ap Bleddyn. He had at least 9 sons with Betyn Norris. He died in 1320, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 116.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgonは1204年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンランサノーでCadwgan ap Bleddynの息子として生まれた。彼はBetyn Norrisとの間に少なくとも9人の息子をもうけた。彼は1320年にイギリスウェールズで116歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon(은)는 1204년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 랜산어에서 Cadwgan ap Bleddyn의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Betyn Norris(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 웨일스에서 116세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon родился в 1204 г. в местности ллансаннор, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Cadwgan ap Bleddyn. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей от Betyn Norris. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 116 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon nació en 1204, en Llansannor, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Cadwgan ap Bleddyn. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos con Betyn Norris. Murió en 1320, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 116 años.
